KenEasy Image Kit — vendored third-party libraries
====================================================

These files are bundled locally so the app runs fully offline (no CDN at runtime).

| File            | Package     | Version | License      | Source |
| --------------- | ----------- | ------- | ------------ | ------ |
| Sortable.min.js | sortablejs  | 1.15.6  | MIT          | https://github.com/SortableJS/Sortable |
| jszip.min.js    | jszip       | 3.10.1  | MIT or GPLv3 | https://github.com/Stuk/jszip |

Notes
-----
- SortableJS is MIT licensed.
- JSZip is dual-licensed under the MIT license OR GPLv3. This project uses it
  under the MIT license.
- Re-fetch / bump pins with: scratch/fetch-vendor.ps1

All other image processing (decode, resize, re-encode) uses the browser's
built-in Canvas API — no additional runtime dependency.
